results.title: Box, Inc. | BBB Complaints | Better Business Bureau
results.content: Resolved:The complainant verified the issue was resolved to their satisfaction. Unresolved:The business responded to the dispute but failed to make a good faith effort to resolve it. Answered:The business addressed the issues within the complaint, but the consumer either a) did not accept the response, OR b) did not notify BBB as to their satisfaction. Unanswered:The business failed to respond to the dispute. Unpursuable:BBB is unable to locate the business.    Dear Better Business Bureau,I am writing to formally lodge a complaint against Box, Inc. regarding their egregious failure to cancel my account despite multiple requests over the past two years. I am deeply frustrated and disheartened by their continued disregard for my clear instructions and their refusal to honor my cancellation [...] we rely heavily on data integrity and security. However, Box's negligence and inadequate support have jeopardized our operations.On January 20, 2024, Minor-I.T. was the victim of a ransomware attack, leading us to wipe our NAS server and rely on Box's data replication service. However, upon attempting to restore our data, we discovered a disparity: only 1.1 TB of data was retrievable, a fraction of our 17 TB of critical information. This loss has had a crippling effect on our organization, hindering our ability to function and serve our community.Our attempts to seek assistance from Box have been met with incompetence. Despite our pleas for help, Box's support team has been unresponsive, leaving us to navigate this crisis alone. The lack of professionalism displayed by Box's [...] alone. The lack of professionalism displayed by Box's representatives, including the "web app specialist" REMOVED, is disgraceful.REMOVED has failed to fulfill his duties as a support specialist, offering excuses and empty promises. His attempts to shift blame onto our organization are baseless. We have provided evidence to refute these claims, yet REMOVED continues to evade responsibility and provide no meaningful assistance.It is unacceptable that Box would fail so miserably in providing basic data protection measures. The loss of our data, coupled with Box's customer service, has put our organization at risk.We demand immediate action from Box, including a full restoration of our data and compensation for damages incurred. We urge the Better Business Bureau to conduct a thorough

## WARNING: AVOID Box File Service at All Costs!
I have never encountered such a frustrating, infuriating, and utterly unprofessional service in my life! Box File Service auto-renewed my subscription without my consent, and I was charged a day before I even realized what had happened. As soon as I discovered the charge, I immediately reached out to their support team to explain that I no longer wanted the service and asked for a refund. You would think that a company would at least try to make things right, but no — instead, they hid behind their Terms and Conditions like a shield to justify their blatant disregard for customer satisfaction. ## over charge
@box There is no real customer service. No way to speak to a human. No phone support, no replies to tickets or emails.

The only thing that works is paying more money to add seats. But when I tried to cancel or fix an accidental $1,680 charge — I got zero response.

I submitted multiple tickets: #3348901 and #3348904, emailed support, and even filed a BBB complaint. Still no help.

Now I have to cancel my credit card just to stop being charged. This is outrageous. #BoxSupport #BoxFail #CustomerService

## Totally awful
Totally awful. There was an issue in uploading files, so I wanted to clear it and start again. However, there is no other way of deleting contents in a file other than manually selecting each one by one. You can select all by clicking ctr + A, but you can't do anything to whatever you selected.

I am extremely disappointed with the service provided by Box. [...] Nov 19, 2025

Image 47: Rated 1 out of 5 stars

## Overall very bad
Very bad update speed on files, normally save multiple old copies and eat up so much space. However, one time I moved files out of Box - they copied EMPTY files out instead of carrying the content with it. When I tried to undo the action, they copied the empty files back in, making me lose all the content. This time, they don't save any old copies automatically!!!! Horrible website - I am using it because my school uses it for file transfer.

Image 49: Rated 1 out of 5 stars [...] I had used the platform in the past for file storage and transfers and never experienced any issues related to bandwidth limits, uploads, or downloads. However, after recently subscribing to a paid plan specifically to unlock full features and work with large amounts of data, I started facing serious problems.

What happened:

- Box began imposing severe traffic/bandwidth restrictions without any clear transparency;

- Uploads started failing constantly;

- Then my downloads also became limited/blocked;

- I currently have around 2.5 TB of files stored there and now I cannot even properly download my own data;

- The service became practically unusable for the very purpose it was purchased for.

results.title: Tiny Box Company is rated "Excellent" with 4.8 / 5 on Trustpilot
results.content:
IM

Iqbal Muhammad GB•4 reviews

Apr 15, 2026

Image 58: Rated 1 out of 5 stars

## Very poor service and no progress on order
I had a very disappointing experience with Tiny Box Company.

I placed an order for customised gold bar gift boxes with a specific design, and despite waiting, there has been no real progress at all. It feels like the order has just been sitting there with no action taken.

Communication has also been frustrating. Instead of clear updates or timelines, I’ve had to chase their support team multiple times without getting a proper resolution.

If the company is not able to handle custom design work, they should not be accepting such orders in the first place. This has caused unnecessary delays and inconvenience. [...] Overall, very unprofessional service. I would not recommend them, especially if you are working to a deadline or need reliable delivery.

April 15, 2026

Unprompted review

Useful 1

Share

Image 59: Tiny Box Company logo

Reply from Tiny Box Company

Jul 13, 2026

Thank you for taking the time to leave your feedback.

We're sorry to hear that your experience did not meet your expectations. We understand how frustrating delays can be, particularly with a printed order.

We have investigated your order and can confirm that a full refund was issued upon your cancellation request. While custom-designed products do require additional approval and production stages, we appreciate that this does not lessen the disappointment when expectations are not met. [...] Useful

Share

Image 76: Tiny Box Company logo

Reply from Tiny Box Company

Feb 24, 2026

Hi Ian,

Thank you for taking the time to leave a review, we appreciate the feedback.

I’ve looked into your order and can see it was placed on 10th February at 9:37am, processed promptly, and dispatched the following day (11th February). According to the courier tracking, delivery was successfully completed on 14th February at 3:18pm.

This falls within the 2–5 working day delivery service selected at checkout. That said, I’m sorry to hear the delivery felt longer than expected, we do understand how frustrating waits can feel when you’re looking forward to your order.
